titleStmt.title: SII 31.143: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 143. (A.R. No. B 108 of 1937-38.) ŚRĪRANGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK AND DISTRICT, TAMIL NADU.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Garuḍamaṇḍapa, V Prākāra in the temple of śrī Ranganathasvāmi.
It is dated in Śaka 1593, Virōdhakṛit, Māgha ba. 3, Monday, Uttiranakshatram regularly corresponding Feruary 5, Monday, 1672 A.D.,

Registers a gift of land in the village Kūttappāra in Kōnāḍu to the east of Triruchināpalli by Basavappa-Nāyuḍu, son of Jaṅgama-Nāyuḍu, of Kāsyapa gōtra for offerings and worship to the god on the 8th day of the festival instituted by Chokkanāthanāyaka when the god was taken in procession to Vasanthavilāsa maṇḍapam in Nāchhiyār-tōppu.
(Published in South Indaia Inscription Volume XXIV. Ins. No. 548, p 529-30).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śālivāhasa śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1593 Agunēṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvatsara mā
gha ba3 Iṁduvāsaraṁ vuttaraṁ nakṣatraṁ kūḍina yi
śubhadinamaṁdu dakṣiṇapugaṭṭu pāṁḍikulā(śi)
śanivāḷanāḍu tiruvaraṁgaṁ tirupati perumā
ḷlu śrīraṁganāyakula śrībhaṁḍārānkukāśya
pagōtraṁ jaṁggamanā(na)yani putruṁḍu basavappanā
yaḍuddaṁḍaṁ samarpiṁcci Iccina pūliveṭṭu śilāśā
sanakramaṁ rāyagōpurapra(pā)kārāniki tūrupuna
Ādikēśava perumāḷu kōviḷuku paḍamara
yimadhyanunna nāṁcārammatōpulōna vubhayaṁ vasa
ṁta vilāsa maṁṭapa maṁdu cokkanādhanayyavāri
vubhayamaina mahātsavamaṁdu yanimidō di
naṁ nāḍu vēṁcciśēṭaṁduku nidhi dīpānakunnu
maṁgaḷahāratikinnicce camarupaḷlu 3kī Þ3 mā
lakulu palālu2r �ß Āraṁgiṁpunu bonaṁtaḷi gelu 12 ki taḷigelu 10
kṣēmaṁ taḷigelu 20 vubhayaṁ taḷigelu 12ki taḷige 1
ki biyyaṁcē camarussa 3 ñu lēkhaga 410 borugulu
2rega 13 dośelu 300 kīga 8 ñu vaḍalu 300 kīga
4 2 Atirasālu 300kī 184 pesaru giṁja gō
nalu 20kī ga 20 kī pānakaṁ gūnalu 20 kīga ceruppa
1 pāvaḍaku taḷigelu 40 biyyaṁ 6� ki ga
1 ce camurupaḷlu 2 kī 2 pesalakrayaṁ 11
kūragāya Araṭikāyalu laṁki Õ 4 pa
nasakāyalu 5 ki 2 paṁkāyaka 1 ki Õ
kāṁkarakāya ka 1 ki Õ 2 pu dōsakāyalu
20 ki Õ yiṁduku vuppumiriya ciṁtta
paṁḍu palassaṁbāraṁ Õ 4 ce camarupaḷlu 1 r(ri)
1 teṁkāyalu ga 0 Areṁṭipaṁḍlu 500 ki
ga 0 nārikēḷāmṛtālu 2001 cerukulu
200 ki ga . panasapaṁḍlu 5 ki r 2 gaṁdhaṁppiḷlu
12 ki Õ 3 bhāgāla phalālu 40 kini Akulu 500
ka 4 sugaṁdhaṁ tirumāle Õ 2 pāvaḍa parivaṁṭṭaṁ
tirumaṁgāvirga 0 ma paṁ
deli veyyanu Adde ga Õ śrībaṁḍārāna ma
ddi koppera mōdalaina ceruvulu teccē Addeki 1 na
dīpaṭu kiṁce camarupaḷlu 22 ki ga 2 Õ 2 ṭēkke
lu dīviṭu yotte Addegaveṭa kōvulamaṁdu kra
yaṁ ga 0 cillara daḷavāḍanaku ga 1 Õ 0 Aṁttuga
23ki cirutanāpalleku tūrppakōnāṭu va
ṇitamulō kkūttappāragrāmāna kiḷanāṭu
kāluva pāraṭaṁtō dēvadānaṁ maḷlalō padnā
lugu cētulanēla cērccināraṁgganaka yī prikāraṁ
svāmi śrīraṁgganāyakulavāri śrībhaṁḍārā
naku basavappa yiccina poliveṭu śilāśāsanamu vrā
sinadi śrīraṁggasdhalaṁ saṁprati rāmappa vāsinadi
yiṁdduku yajamanaśaṁ kaliginadi yīndhalaṁ
ccakanaṁ perumāḷayya Anubhaviṁccēdi jē
yimastu vinikoḍaguruvappa Ācāri vrālu ve di
Digital edition of SII 31.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
